name: troje
description: Honeypot that runs each connection with the service within a separate LXC container. Tool: https://github.com/dutchcoders/troje/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #418 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map troje output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved troje output file to parse instead of running it live.
